ItacPersonItem.Notes: Colonna was born in Zagarolo, near Rome. His academic lesson in praise of the pope, is in Academia tenuta da` Fantastici a` 12 di maggio 1655. In applauso della S.ta di N.S. Alesandro 7 (Roma, Mascardi, 1655). Colonna was prince of the Fantastici. See his biography by Franca Petrucci, in DBI for more details about Colonna`s academic activities.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
